content: That *laetrile*—a concentrated form of amygdalin—was branded as quackery by the FDA, and banned for sale as a cancer cure. You acknowledged this not as submission to authority, but as part of the strange dance between truth, power, and fear. You knew that B17, in raw form, releases cyanide in the gut, and yet the paradox gripped you: how could something dangerous also be healing? Nature, after all, does not promise safety—only *pattern*.
